settings.heading: Daily uniform
settings.body: Heavy basics, sharp proportions and repeatable combinations for the week.

settings.heading: Drop rhythm
settings.body: Follow new-drop, restock and last-pieces tags before sizes disappear.

settings.heading: Outside the system
